title: Street Corn
instructions: Step 1. Place the corn kernels in a small skillet or saucepan and heat over medium until warmed through.
Step 2. Remove from heat and mix with the mayonnaise and lime juice until combined. Season with salt to taste.
Step 3. Serve the hot corn in small cups, sprinkle with the grated dry cheese and finish by topping with Taqueritos Chile Toreado just before serving to add crunch and a spicy touch.
